headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://qexfndiyallwqhhzeerd.supabase.co https://www.google-analytics.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then exit 1; fi; if git diff --quiet "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" HEAD -- .; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi'
